revision.comment: Adding "itvend" as a class, which is needed for Infobox television date validation
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Template now uses [[Module:Date time]] to both generate a date and validate the values
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Date time|generate_date|template=end date}}<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using end date with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:End date]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | df }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Date time|generate_date|template=end date}}<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using end date with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:End date]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | df }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Date time|generate_date|template=end date}}<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using end date with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:End date]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | df }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=End_date here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=End_date for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#invoke:Date time|generate_date|template=end date}}<!-- Tracking categories -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:End date]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | df }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Pages using end date with unknown parameters|_VALUE_]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
